sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96633" key="sterfwth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στερφ-ωτήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clad in hides</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ς. στρατός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
